summary: Loosens channels.telegram_id from UNIQUE NOT NULL to nullable with a partial unique index, enabling non-Telegram sources

observations.text: Uses the SQLite table-rebuild pattern (CREATE new, INSERT SELECT, DROP old, RENAME) because ALTER COLUMN is not supported. Foreign key constraints on messages and sync_state CASCADE from channels.id which is unchanged.
The partial unique index (WHERE telegram_id IS NOT NULL) allows multiple rows with telegram_id=NULL while still preventing two Telegram channels with the same telegram_id.
